source_jobs.title: Operations Leader (General Interest)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Conscious Talent connects high-performing professionals that are deeply committed to inner work and professional excellence to opportunities at companies that value this. We help leaders like you find roles that align not just with your expertise, but with your inner growth journey and purpose. 

We believe that when leaders who are committed to their inner and outer development come together, new ways of relating, creating, and leading emerge. 




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Conscious Talent is looking for world-class operations leaders (COOs, VP of Operations, Heads of Operations, Directors of Operations) who are committed to their inner work journey and mastery of their craft.

Ideal candidates will have a proven track record of building scalable operations, driving cross-functional alignment, and fostering resilient, values-driven cultures. If you’re someone who sees operational excellence as a foundation for organizational flourishing and wants to work in an environment that honors your authenticity and growth journey, we’d love to hear from you.




WHAT YOU MIGHT DO (DEPENDING ON THE OPPORTUNITY)

 - Lead overall company operations, systems, and processes to support growth and mission fulfillment

 - Build and mentor high-performing operational and cross-functional teams

 - Drive strategic planning, execution rhythms, and continuous improvement initiatives

 - Collaborate closely with executive leadership to translate vision into scalable execution

 - Foster a culture of operational excellence, trust, and empowerment across teams

 - Integrate inner work values such as presence, intentionality, and conscious communication into operational practices

 - Contribute to a leadership culture that prizes authenticity, self-awareness, and trust


WHO YOU ARE

 - 6+ years in operations leadership roles (e.g., COO, VP of Operations, Head of Operations, Director of Operations)

 - Experience leading scaling operations at high-growth startups or enterprises

 - Skilled at building systems that enhance clarity, efficiency, and cultural alignment

 - Values-driven, growth-oriented, and passionate about building not just great systems, but thriving teams

 - Your life demonstrates commitment to personal development, self-awareness, and understanding others

 - Interested in a deeper integration between your personal and professional development


BONUS POINTS

 - Prior experience in conscious organizations or purpose-driven companies

 - Expertise in strategic planning, OKR frameworks, or operational scaling methodologies

 - Background in building cultures where operational excellence and human development are integrated


WHY APPLY?

Joining our talent network puts you on the radar for opportunities with companies that truly value who you are beyond the basics in your resume. Whether or not you’re actively job hunting, we want to know you — so when the right opportunity arises, you’re already in the flow.

source_jobs.title: Internal Recruiter (General Interest)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Conscious Talent connects high-performing professionals that are deeply committed to inner work and professional excellence to opportunities at companies that value this. We help leaders like you find roles that align not just with your expertise, but with your inner growth journey and purpose. 

We believe that when leaders who are committed to their inner and outer development come together, new ways of relating, creating, and leading emerge. 




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Conscious Talent is looking for a values-driven, self-aware recruiter to join our internal team. As an early member of the Conscious Talent team, you will play a critical role in shaping how we identify, engage, and support executives who are committed to both career excellence and inner work.

Ideal candidates will have experience in full-cycle recruiting for senior-level roles (Director, VP, C-Suite) and a personal connection to the importance of self-awareness, growth, and conscious leadership in the workplace.

If you’re someone who sees recruiting as an act of service connecting the right people to the right missions and you want to help build a movement that transforms the future of work, we’d love to hear from you.




WHAT YOU MIGHT DO

 - Source, engage, and build relationships with executive candidates aligned with Conscious Talent’s mission and ethos
   

 - Manage full-cycle search processes across a range of executive functions (e.g., technology, product, marketing, sales, operations, finance)
   

 - Collaborate closely with Conscious Talent leadership to refine search strategies and client alignment
   

 - Conduct deep candidate assessments that honor both hard skills and personal growth journeys
   

 - Maintain and cultivate our growing talent network with authenticity and care
   

 - Help create an experience for candidates that is warm, human, and deeply respectful
   

 - Integrate inner work values such as presence, discernment, and conscious communication into the recruiting process
   


WHO YOU ARE

 - 3–7+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience, preferably with a focus on executive or leadership roles
   

 - Skilled at building authentic relationships and intuitively assessing candidate-company alignment
   

 - Values-driven, growth-oriented, and passionate about helping people find aligned career opportunities
   

 - Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple searches and relationships simultaneously
   

 - Your life demonstrates commitment to personal development, self-awareness, and understanding others
   

 - Excited to help build a new kind of recruiting firm that integrates consciousness and business
   


BONUS POINTS

 - Prior experience recruiting in high-growth startup, VC-backed, or mission-driven environments
   

 - Deep network of values-aligned executive talent across industries
   


WHY JOIN US?

Joining Conscious Talent is an opportunity to help pioneer a new paradigm in work one where career excellence and personal growth are equally valued. You’ll be part of a mission-driven, early-stage team committed to transforming the future of work for the better.

We believe that when leaders who are committed to their inner and outer development come together, new ways of relating, creating, and leading emerge.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Conscious Talent is looking for world-class strategy and transformation leaders (Chief Strategy Officers, Heads of Transformation, VP of Strategic Initiatives, Directors of Organizational Effectiveness) who are committed to their inner work journey and mastery of their craft.

Ideal candidates will have a proven track record of guiding companies through complex strategic shifts, designing org-wide transformation efforts, and aligning vision with execution. If you’re someone who sees strategic work as both an analytical and human endeavor and wants to operate in a context that honors both depth and clarity we’d love to hear from you.




WHAT YOU MIGHT DO (DEPENDING ON THE OPPORTUNITY)

 - Lead strategic planning, transformation road mapping, and change management efforts
   

 - Partner with CEOs and executive teams to define and execute on long-term organizational vision
   

 - Align structures, processes, and culture to support intentional growth and evolution
   

 - Facilitate cross-functional initiatives that require systems-level thinking and collaboration
   

 - Build scalable frameworks for organizational learning, adaptability, and innovation
   

 - Integrate inner work values such as reflection, systems awareness, and clarity of purpose into transformation efforts
   

 - Contribute to a leadership culture that prizes authenticity, self-awareness, and trust
   


WHO YOU ARE

 - 8+ years in strategic leadership roles (e.g., CSO, Head of Transformation, Strategy Lead, Organizational Effectiveness Director)
   

 - Experience leading transformation initiatives in high-growth or complex organizational environments
   

 - Skilled at systems thinking, change enablement, and strategic storytelling
   

 - Values-driven, growth-oriented, and passionate about building organizations that are aligned inside and out
   

 - Your life demonstrates commitment to personal development, self-awareness, and understanding others
   

 - Interested in a deeper integration between your personal and professional development


BONUS POINTS

 - Prior experience in conscious organizations or purpose-driven companies
   

 - Background in consulting, organizational design, or large-scale change leadership
   

 - Familiarity with frameworks like Theory U, Adaptive Leadership, or Regenerative Design
   


WHY APPLY?

Joining our talent network puts you on the radar for opportunities with companies that truly value who you are beyond the basics in your resume. Whether or not you’re actively job hunting, we want to know you so when the right opportunity arises, you’re already in the flow.

source_jobs.title: Head of Marketing @ Circadian Health Company
source_jobs.description:
Role: Head of Marketing
Location: Remote
Salary: $120K-$160K based on experience

Our client has grown from a Shopify store to a seven-figure ecommerce brand with 40K+ passionate customers who've transformed their sleep, energy, and health through light therapy. Now they're at an inflection point: evolving from product-focused to education-first, launching their first flagship course, and positioning ourselves as the definitive authority on living in sync with nature's light.

They're looking for a Head of Marketing to architect this transformation and scale us to eight figures.

Key Responsibilities
You'll be their first marketing leader, reporting directly to the Founder, with full autonomy to build the marketing engine from the ground up. This isn't about executing someone else's playbook - you'll write it.

 - Acquisition & Growth:
   
   - Build and scale acquisition funnels across paid media (Meta, Google) with a six-figure budget
   
   - Develop their content engine: SEO strategy that drives organic traffic from 5K to 50K+ monthly visitors
   
   - Relaunch affiliate and influencer programs, turning their community into growth drivers
   
   - Own CRO across the site - every percentage point of conversion improvement = $XX,XXX in revenue

 - The Course Launch (Your Biggest Win):
   
   - Lead go-to-market for their flagship circadian health course - a $500K+ Year 1 revenue opportunity
   
   - Design the pricing strategy, positioning, and funnel that converts product customers into students
   
   - Establish them as the education leader in an emerging wellness category

 - Retention & Lifecycle:
   
   - Build CRM, email, and SMS automation that guides customers through transformation (not just transactions)
   
   - Create a testimonial and case study engine - leverage their customers' success stories to build trust at scale
   
   - Design community-driven marketing that turns customers into evangelists

 - Systems & Team:
   
   - Establish marketing KPIs, reporting dashboards, and a scalable calendar
   
   - Hire and build your dream team as the company grows (you'll make your first hire within 6 months)


Qualifications

 - Required:
   
   - 5+ years leading marketing at a DTC or consumer brand, ideally health/wellness
   
   - Proven track record scaling brands from low seven figures to eight figures
   
   - Deep expertise in paid acquisition, SEO, content marketing, and CRO
   
   - Hands-on experience with email/SMS platforms (Klaviyo, Attentive, etc.) and building automated lifecycles
   
   - Experience launching and scaling influencer, affiliate, or referral programs
   
   - You've launched a digital product, course, or membership before (huge plus)

 - Your Approach:
   
   - Strategic thinker who can zoom out to define positioning, then zoom in to write the email subject line
   
   - Data-driven but creative - you A/B test everything but know when to trust your gut
   
   - Comfortable in scrappy, fast-moving environments where you wear multiple hats
   
   - Obsessed with transformation marketing, not just performance marketing

 - Passion:
   
   - You genuinely care about health, wellness, and helping people live better
   
   - Bonus: You have opinions on red light therapy, sleep optimization, circadian rhythms, or biohacking


Why This Role is Different
For Senior Marketers: This isn't a "scale what's already working" role. You'll reposition an entire brand, launch new revenue streams, and define a category. If you've been stuck optimizing someone else's campaigns at a larger company, this is your chance to build from first principles.

The Opportunity:

 - Timing: Proven product-market fit (4.8★ rating, rabid community), now entering exponential growth phase

 - Ownership: First marketing hire = you build everything. Full P&L ownership. No politics, no red tape.

 - Equity: Meaningful equity stake in a fast-growing wellness brand, not just a salary

 - Impact: Your work directly determines whet

source_jobs.title: Head of Product @ AI Data Labeling Startup
source_jobs.description:
Role: Head of Product
Location: San Francisco / Bay Area (preferred)



ABOUT OUR CLIENT:

Our client is a high-growth AI company building the infrastructure that enables humans and AI to collaborate at scale. They believe that for better AI, better data is needed — and that the best data comes from experts who are well supported, incentivized, and scaffolded for success.

Originally founded to empower meaningfully engaged work for experts, our client now orchestrates teams of specialists to help AI models perform expert-only capabilities at scale. They design systems that allow top-tier experts to contribute high-quality data — and AI researchers to consume it seamlessly — enabling their partners to build more capable, reliable, and aligned AI systems.



POSITION OVERVIEW:

Our client is building the infrastructure layer for expert-curated, extremely high-quality data powering the world’s leading AI models. They’re seeking a Head of Product to lead product strategy, UX, and design for the platform that connects world-class experts to frontier AI research.

This role is ideal for a systems-oriented product leader — someone who has scaled products from ~$1M to $100M+ ARR, blends strong product taste with deep user empathy, and can operate fluently across AI research, expert contributor workflows, and enterprise needs.

You will own their expert-facing and customer-facing product surfaces — defining how experts onboard, vet, contribute, and maintain quality, as well as how researchers and enterprise customers interact with their data-delivery systems.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Product & Design Leadership
   
   - Define and drive the end-to-end product vision, UX, and design for their expert and customer platforms.
   
   - Lead a multidisciplinary team across product management, UX/UI design, and product operations.
   
   - Establish a product culture grounded in user empathy, experimentation, and high taste.
   
   - Own prioritization frameworks, roadmap planning, and execution cadence across product verticals.

 - UX, Interface & Expert Experience
   
   - Design world-class onboarding, vetting, and work interfaces for a global network of experts.
   
   - Build systems that ensure expert motivation, fraud detection, and sustained high-quality contributions.
   
   - Partner with Delivery to translate operational workflows into intuitive and elegant product surfaces.
   
   - Champion accessibility, usability, and delight in every user interaction.

 - AI-Native Product Development
   
   - Partner with Research & Applied AI to integrate ML-powered capabilities across expert and customer interfaces.
   
   - Translate emerging AI capabilities into usable product experiences that meaningfully improve throughput and quality.
   
   - Define human-in-the-loop UX for expert review, annotation, and feedback cycles.

 - Business & Strategic Leadership
   
   - Serve as a key thought partner to the CEO and executive team on product-driven business strategy.
   
   - Collaborate with GTM, Operations, and Customer Success to align product development with revenue, adoption, and customer needs.
   
   - Represent the product and design vision in board, investor, and strategic partner settings.
   
   - Develop metrics and frameworks that tie product outcomes directly to business impact.




QUALIFICATIONS:

 - Strategic & Entrepreneurial Leadership
   
   - Founder-like ownership with experience scaling 0→1 and 1→100 products.
   
   - Operates fluidly from long-term vision to pixel-level detail.
   
   - Thinks in systems, leverage, and outcomes — not just features.

 - Design Taste & User Obsession
   
   - Deep aesthetic sensibility and product craftsmanship.
   
   - Relentless focus on user empathy and behavior — especially experts and researchers.
   
   - Balances simplicity, beauty, and utility within constraints.

 - Technical Fluency
   
   - Comfortable with data systems, ML workflows, and APIs; capable of partnering c

source_jobs.title: Head of Marketing @ AI-powered Personal Growth Startup
source_jobs.description:
Role: Head of Marketing
Location: LA-based preferred. Remote considered for the right candidate, with willingness to visit LA for planning weeks.
Salary/Compensation: $160k – $190k + equity



ABOUT OUR CLIENT:

Our client is an AI-powered journaling and self-reflection platform helping people deepen self-awareness, build emotional intelligence, and make visible progress toward the life they want. The experience sits at the intersection of journaling, coaching, and AI-guided reflection.

They have reached 500,000+ downloads, 20,000+ paying customers, and $2.5M ARR and growing. The company recently raised a $6M seed round led by top-tier investors and operators.

75% of users report meaningful improvement within 7 days, and independent Stanford research has validated the product’s impact on self-relationship.

The founding team has previously built and scaled consumer products used by millions, and has spent years working at the intersection of technology, psychology, and personal growth.

The mission is deeply personal: mentorship and mental health support have historically only been accessible to those who can afford it. Their goal is to make that support significantly more accessible through technology.



POSITION OVERVIEW:

Our client is approaching a significant brand refresh and relaunch. The product is maturing. Unit economics are working. The team is small and the surface area is large. This hire walks into a defining moment - and owns it fully.

This is not a role where you inherit a machine and optimize it. This is a role where you build the machine, set the standard, and shape what the brand becomes at its most important inflection point.

This role reports directly to the CEO and is designed as a path to CMO as the team scales.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Own growth strategy end to end. Bring your own conviction about which engines will carry the next stage. Not five bets - one clear thesis, executed with depth.

 - Own creative quality across every customer-facing surface including ads, landing pages, App Store presence, push, email, social, and PR.

 - Build and lead the creative engine. Generate hooks, angles, and artifacts at volume while editing ruthlessly.

 - Develop deep ICP mastery and build a strong thesis around who users are, how they decide, and what language reaches them.

 - Partner closely with the CEO on brand stewardship. For a therapeutic product, brand trust is the product.

 - Design measurement scaffolding including clean experiments, honest baselines, compounded learnings, and rigorous testing frameworks.

 - Own funnel performance across acquisition, activation, engagement, and retention in partnership with product.

 - Direct and elevate external and internal creative talent including writers, designers, and agencies.




QUALIFICATIONS:

 - 8+ years of senior marketing experience with a portfolio of consumer brand work you can point to and defend line by line.

 - Experience scaling a consumer subscription app from early traction to meaningful scale.

 - Strong creative instincts paired with operational discipline and analytical rigor.

 - Ability to write compelling copy and explain clearly why it works.

 - Real interest in mental health, psychology, behavior change, or personal growth.

 - Product-fluent mindset with strong understanding of engagement, retention, and consumer behavior.

 - Strong brand stewardship instincts with sensitivity toward tone, trust, and authenticity.

 - Preference for focus and depth over running multiple shallow experiments simultaneously.

 - High-agency, low-ego operator who moves quickly and takes ownership.

 - Personal connection to self-reflection, therapy, or personal development is strongly preferred.



WHAT THEY OFFER:

 - $160k – $190k + equity

 - Flexibility for the right candidate

 - Remote flexibility for exceptional candidates, with willingness to visit Los Angeles for planning weeks

 - Opportunity to own and shape marketing at a major in

notes: Conscious Talent is a recruitment platform focused on connecting professionals with companies that value inner work and professional excellence.
